data.title: CLASH Token’s Friday Night Tournament Brings Web3 Heat to Clash Royale: Everything You Need to Know
data.description:
The highly anticipated Friday Night Tournament featuring the CLASH Token is set to ignite excitement in the world of Clash Royale, bringing a fresh wave of Web3 applications to the popular game. Here’s everything you need to know about this thrilling event, including how to participate, the prizes up for grabs, and the innovative ways blockchain technology is being integrated into the gaming experience. Whether you're a seasoned player or a newcomer, this tournament promises to elevate the competitive spirit and showcase the growing intersection of gaming and cryptocurrency in a way that’s never been seen before. Don’t miss out on the action!
source: https://blocknews.com/clash-tokens-friday-night-tournament-brings-web3-heat-to-clash-royale-everything-you-need-to-know/

data.title: Weekly Crypto Regulation Roundup: CZ Pardon Talks Gain Momentum as States Advance Crypto Policy
data.description:
The past week brought a flurry of regulatory and political developments in the U. S. crypto landscape—from a potential pardon for Binance’s Changpeng “CZ” Zhao to states taking bold legislative steps around digital assets. At the same time, the federal government faces continued gridlock over funding, and regulators are pursuing their largest-ever crypto seizure tied to global fraud.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/weekly-crypto-regulation-roundup-cz-pardon-talks-gain-momentum-as-states-advance-crypto-policy/

data.title: South Korea limits Cambodia travel as US Treasury exposes multi-billion dollar crypto scam ring
data.description:
South Korea has implemented a travel ban for its citizens to specific areas in Cambodia due to a surge in kidnappings linked to cyber-scam operations. The ban comes amid a major international crackdown on Southeast Asian cyber-scam networks that has outed Cambodia as a hub for forced-labor crypto fraud operations, forcing the US Treasury Department, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-korea-limits-cambodia-travel-scam-ring/

data.title: What is EtherHiding? Google flags malware with crypto-stealing code in smart contracts
data.description:
"EtherHiding" deploys in two phases by compromising a website, which then communicates with malicious code embedded in a smart contract.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/north-korea-hackers-etherhiding-exploit-google?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fttt%3D1760726367048%26_rnd%3Duqc96x&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
